title: Kaseya shifts from AI ‘insights’ to autonomous action with new agentic platform | ChannelPro
description: The company aims to evolve from its suite of management tools into an autonomous operating system for MSPs

title: April KB5083769 Windows 11 update causes backup software failures
description: The April 2026 KB5083769 security update breaks third-party backup applications from multiple vendors on systems running Windows 11 24H2 and 25H2.

title: Inside Lazarus: How North Korea uses AI to industrialize attacks on developers | Expel
description: Expel is tracking a North Korean (DPRK) state-sponsored APT group. This group is targeting Web3 developers to steal cryptocurrency and NFTs.

title: The long con: How North Korean spies spent months in-person to drain $285 million from Drift
description: For the first time ever, North Korean hackers are carrying out in-person attacks on crypto and becoming faster and more sophisticated, says TRMLabs global head of policy.
